title: Review P1 fix: reconcile swarming-reference Codex spawn rows to ORCH-01 syntax and wire the census into verify
action: The Runtime Spawn Mechanics table still teaches the retired Codex API (spawn_agent(agent_type=..., fork_context=false), Re-spawn_agent prose) that SPEC ORCH-01/E-06 forbids; scripts/census_stale_spawn_syntax.mjs correctly flags 4 violations but is red and not wired into commands.verify, so verify stays green over wrong operative guidance. Fix: rewrite the three Codex cells (Spawn, Follow-up, Isolation) to the sanctioned collaboration API — spawn_agent({task_name, message, fork_turns:"none"}), followup_task({target, message}), no re-spawn phrasing — sync the .claude projection copy, then append node scripts/census_stale_spawn_syntax.mjs to commands.verify in .bee/config.json so the guard bites from now on.

trace.verification_evidence: RED (before): census exited 1 with 4 violations (swarming-reference.md:120,123,125 — agent_type/fork_context/Re-spawn_agent) and was absent from commands.verify. GREEN (after): table rewritten to ORCH-01 API (task_name/message/fork_turns + followup_task), projections synced, census exits 0 and is wired as verify suite #16; full chain green.
trace.verify_output: census_stale_spawn_syntax: clean — no stale Codex spawn syntax found (was 4 violations at swarming-reference.md:120,123,125 before the table rewrite — red-first characterization recorded in review finding). grep confirms the census is appended to commands.verify; full 16-suite verify chain green end-to-end.
